name: bls_oews
description: BLS Occupational Employment and Wage Statistics MCP server (1102tools/federal-contracting-mcps). 7 read-only tools over the Bureau of Labor Statistics OEWS public API: occupational wage data lookups by SOC code + metro area, metro/occupation comparisons, IGCE wage benchmarks for cost estimates and price-to-win analysis, latest-year detection, and SOC/metro reference helpers. Powers Independent Government Cost Estimate (IGCE) construction and labor-rate benchmarking. Requires BLS_API_KEY (free at bls.gov/developers; rate-limited per key).
